query: Folding laundry and getting ready to relax. 24 minutes after the washer 1 in the utility room finishes, turn on TV 1 in the living room to play and set heat pump 1 in the utility room to heating mode.

steps.thought: I need to find the device IDs for washer 1, heat pump 1 in the utility room, and TV 1 in the living room. I will start by getting the devices in the utility room.
I have identified the washer and heat pump in the utility room. Now I need to find the TV in the living room to get its device ID.

I need to understand the washer's structure to see how to detect when it finishes (e.g., OperationalState, CountdownTime). I also need to check the TV and Heat Pump structures to know how to control them.
I need to check the TV's structure to find the correct command or attribute to turn it on and play. I will also check the heat pump's structure for heating mode control.

I need to check the heat pump's structure to find the correct cluster and command/attribute to set it to heating mode. I also need to verify the washer's current countdown time to calculate the exact schedule time.

The washer's countdown is 3512 seconds (58m 32s). Current time is 17:04:22, so it finishes at 18:02:54. Adding 24 minutes gives a schedule time of 18:26:54. I will schedule a workflow to turn on the TV, play media, and set the heat pump to heating mode (SystemMode 2) at that time.
The workflow has been successfully scheduled. I will now inform the user of the scheduled time and actions.

action_input.answer: I have scheduled the actions to occur 24 minutes after the washer finishes. The washer is expected to finish at 18:02:54, so the TV will turn on and play, and the heat pump will switch to heating mode at 18:26:54.
